docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BOONWAN, EKAWIT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO PLAINTIFF HAS FAILED TO MEET HIS BURDEN OF PROOF. JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF THE DEFENDANT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-15-2025 - JUDGMENT.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING ASHLEY CARNEGIE FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO AUG-15-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ASHLEY CARNEGIE FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-15-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-15-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE TAMILA IPEMA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF EKAWIT BOONWAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (ASHLEY CARNEGIE) IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $11,073.95 FILED BY BOONWAN, EKAWIT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-04-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOONWAN, EKAWIT ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF BOONWAN, EKAWIT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JUN-04-2025, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
SC-109 AUTHORATION TO APPEAR ASHLEY CARNEGIE FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO
